sglang.title: Improve Chinese character streaming when the last char is half Chinese word.
sglang.author: haotian-liu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Currently when the last word is Chinese, but only the first-half, the streaming will be delayed until the next chunk containing a full word -- occasionally delayed by three chunks or more.
Add a check if the penultimate token is a full Chinese word and stream the full words in that case.

vllm.title: Added `include_stop_str_in_output` and `length_penalty` parameters to OpenAI API
vllm.author: galatolofederico
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the include_stop_str_in_output and length_penalty sampling parameters (defined here)  to the OpenAI API parameters.
Note: The force push addresses a missing comma, corrected without making a new commit for a minor syntax fix.

vllm.title: [Doc] Fix the syntax error in the doc of supported_models.
vllm.author: keli-wen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
While reviewing the latest documentation, I noticed that the Supported Models Table is missing, which, in contrast, renders correctly in the stable version.
Attempting to build it from the source resulted in an error:
$ make html
vllm/docs/source/models/supported_models.rst:10: ERROR: Er

vllm.title: Support Batch Completion in Server
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
OpenAI completion protocol support inputs for prompt to be a string, array of strings, array of tokens, or array of token arrays.. This PR adds support for that.
Closes #2441
Closes #2396

vllm.title: fix names and license
vllm.author: JustinLin610
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Previous PR has some small problems with naming and license. Got them fixed.
